idea: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Small Business Loan Applications Signals Financial Strain

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'small business loan application'

behavior: An uptick in searches for small business loans indicates rising financial stress among small businesses, often preceding increased credit market activity.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector ETFs often weaken with increased credit risk signals among small business borrowers.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLF if weekly Google Trends for 'small business loan application' rises by 15%+ WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if the trend falls below a 10% WoW increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly Google Trends for financial search terms routinely move 10-20% week-to-week.

idea: Weekly Jump In Google Trends For 'Job Quitting' Searches Signals Labor Market Stress

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'job quitting'

behavior: Rising interest in quitting jobs signals growing labor market dissatisfaction or turnover risk.

market_impact.rationale: High labor turnover signals operational disruption and cost pressure on industrial companies.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'job quitting' rises by 20%+ WoW
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 4 weeks or if the trend declines by 10% WoW

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market stress terms have strong seasonal and cyclical weekly interest fluctuations.

idea: Daily Spike In Freight Logistics RSS Counts For Port Congestion Reports Signals Supply Chain Pressure

data.source: RSS news feed counts mentioning 'port congestion' or 'logistics delays'

behavior: A daily surge in port congestion news signals increasing supply chain bottlenecks impacting industrial throughput.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector performance is sensitive to supply chain disruptions and logistics constraints.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if daily RSS feed count for 'port congestion' doubles relative to 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or when count returns to normal levels

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Supply chain news tends to cluster around port congestion spikes periodically.

idea: Weekly Google Trends Surge For 'Home Solar Installation' Signals Renewable Energy Demand Spike

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for 'home solar installation'

behavior: Increasing search interest in home solar installation signals pickup in local consumer renewable energy investments.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 6 weeks or if trend falls below 10% WoW increase

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Renewable interest often surges seasonally and around incentive announcements.

idea: Weekly Rise In Earthquake Activity Near Major Manufacturing Hubs Signals Industrial Risk

behavior: A spike in seismic activity near key industrial clusters increases risk perception for manufacturing disruption.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 2 weeks or when counts normalize

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Seismic events cluster regionally and can spike repeatedly in short periods.

trade_logic.exit: Exit after 7 trading days or if trend normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Childcare issues spike frequently due to seasonal illness and school closures.

idea: Daily Volatility Spike In Freight Logistics ETF Volume Signals Short-Term Supply Chain Stress

data.source: Yahoo Finance daily volume and price for IYT ETF through price_only adapter

behavior: Sudden volume and volatility spikes in freight ETFs often precede short-term supply chain adjustments.

market_impact.rationale: Freight and logistics sectors react quickly to supply chain stress and demand shocks.

trade_logic.entry: Enter short XLI if daily volume for IYT ETF spikes above 150% 20-day average and daily return volatility spikes above 2x 20-day average
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 3 trading days or when volume and volatility normalize

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: ETF volume and volatility routinely spike due to short-term supply chain headlines.
